<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<div data-thunderdome-xbrl-exclude="1" id="PGBK" style="width: 100%; margin-right: 0pt; margin-left: 0pt;">
<div id="PGNUM" style="width: 100%; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">45</div>

<hr style="border: currentColor; border-image: none; width: 100%; height: 2px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); page-break-after: always; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">
<div id="PGHDR" style="width: 100%; text-align: left;"><a href="#toc">Table of Contents</a></div>
</div>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">As summarized in the table, there were adjustments totaling <em data-td-fact-id="34100178" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$11.5</em> million to goodwill during the measurement period. These adjustments primarily relate to refinements made to acquired intangible asset cash flow models, and the calculation of the fair value of acquired inventory.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Tangible assets acquired, net of liabilities assumed, were recorded at fair value on the date of close based on management&#39;s assessment. The purchase price allocated to developed technology, trade names, and customer relationships was based on management&#39;s forecasted cash inflows and outflows and using a relief-from-royalty and a multi-period excess earnings method to calculate the fair value of assets purchased. The developed technology is being amortized with the expense reflected in cost of goods sold in the Consolidated Statement of Earnings and Comprehensive Income. Amortization expense related to trade names, and customer relationships is reflected in selling, general and administrative expenses in the Consolidated Statement of Earnings and Comprehensive Income. The amortization periods for intangible assets acquired in fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100179" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> are <em data-td-fact-id="34100180" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">13</em> years for developed technology, <em data-td-fact-id="34100181" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">12</em> years for customer relationships, and <em data-td-fact-id="34100182" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">15</em> years for trade names. The deferred income tax liability represents the net amount of the estimated future impact of adjustments for costs to be recognized upon the sale of acquired inventory that was written up to fair value and intangible asset amortization, both of which are <em data-td-fact-id="34100183" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> deductible for income tax purposes.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&nbsp;</b></i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>Eurocell Diagnostics</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>&nbsp;</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt 7.5pt 0pt 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">On <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> February 1, 2018, the Company </em>acquired Eurocell Diagnostics SAS a company based in Rennes, France for approximately <em data-td-fact-id="34100184" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$7.3</em> million, net of cash acquired.&nbsp;<em data-td-fact-id="34100185" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$6.0</em> million was paid on the acquisition date and the remaining <em data-td-fact-id="34100186" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$1.3</em> million will be paid on <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> February 1, 2019. </em>The Company has had a long-standing business relationship with Eurocell as a distributor of its product line. Eurocell sells directly to the laboratory markets in the French region as well as servicing the EMEA markets via a network of distributors. The transaction was financed through cash on hand.&nbsp; The primary asset in this acquisition is the customer relationships, however, the acquisition&nbsp;resulted in some&nbsp;goodwill as we expect strategic benefits of revenue growth from increased market penetration. The goodwill is <em data-td-fact-id="34100187" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> deductible for income tax purposes. The business became part of the Company&rsquo;s Diagnostics reportable segment in the <em data-td-fact-id="34100188" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">third</em> quarter of fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100189" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018.</em> Purchase accounting was finalized during the <em data-td-fact-id="34100190" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">fourth</em> quarter.&nbsp; The preliminary and final fair values of the assets acquired and liabilities assumed are as follows (in thousands):</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt 7.5pt 0pt 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<div data-td-parse-id="1" data-td-taggable-table="table" data-td-v2v-id="1533998698760" id="thunderdome-statement-982862">
<table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="finTable" style="width: 95%; text-indent: 0px; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-right: 5%;">

		<tr style="vertical-align: bottom;">
			<td style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</td>
			<td id=".lead.D2" style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</td>
			<td colspan="2" id=".amt.D2" style="text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt; border-bottom-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border-bottom-width: 1px; border-bottom-style: solid;">
			<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><i>Preliminary</i></i></p>

			<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><i>Allocation at</i></i></p>

			<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><i>Acquisition </i></i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&nbsp;</b></i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">As summarized in the table, there were adjustments totaling <em data-td-fact-id="34100191" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$2.8</em> million to goodwill during the measurement period. These adjustments primarily relate to the finalization of our opening balance sheet audit procedures and identification of acquired assets.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<div data-thunderdome-xbrl-exclude="1" id="PGBK" style="width: 100%; margin-right: 0pt; margin-left: 0pt;">
<div id="PGNUM" style="width: 100%; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">46</div>

<hr style="border: currentColor; border-image: none; width: 100%; height: 2px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); page-break-after: always; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">
<div id="PGHDR" style="width: 100%; text-align: left;"><a href="#toc">Table of Contents</a></div>
</div>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Tangible assets acquired, net of liabilities assumed, were recorded at fair value on the date of close based on management&#39;s assessment. The purchase price allocated to customer relationships was based on management&#39;s forecasted cash inflows and outflows using a multi-period excess earnings method to calculate the fair value of assets purchased. Amortization expense related customer relationships is reflected in selling, general and administrative expenses in the Consolidated Statement of Earnings and Comprehensive Income. The amortization period for customer relationships acquired in fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100192" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> is <em data-td-fact-id="34100193" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">7</em> years. The deferred income tax liability represents the net amount of the estimated future impact of intangible asset amortization, which is <em data-td-fact-id="34100194" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> deductible for income tax purposes.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>&nbsp;</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><em data-td-fact-id="34100195" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> Acquisitions</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>&nbsp;</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>Advanced Cell Diagnostics (ACD)</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>&nbsp;</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">On <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> August 1, 2016, </em>the Company acquired ACD for approximately <em data-td-fact-id="34100196" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$258.0</em> million, net of cash acquired, plus contingent consideration of up to <em data-td-fact-id="34100197" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$75.0</em> million as follows:</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="width: 100%; text-indent: 0px;">

		<tr style="vertical-align: top;">
			<td style="width: 18pt;">
			<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#9679;</p>
			</td>
			<td>
			<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><em data-td-fact-id="34100198" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$25.0</em> million if calendar year <em data-td-fact-id="34100199" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2016</em> revenues equal or exceed <em data-td-fact-id="34100200" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$30.0</em> million.</p>
			</td>
		</tr>

</table>

<table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="width: 100%; text-indent: 0px;">

		<tr style="vertical-align: top;">
			<td style="width: 18pt;">
			<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#9679;</p>
			</td>
			<td>
			<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">an additional <em data-td-fact-id="34100201" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$50.0</em> million if calendar year <em data-td-fact-id="34100202" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> revenues equal or exceed <em data-td-fact-id="34100203" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$45.0</em> million.</p>
			</td>
		</tr>

</table>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company paid approximately <em data-td-fact-id="34100204" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$247.0</em> million, net of cash acquired and the working capital adjustments, as of the acquisition date. The remaining <em data-td-fact-id="34100205" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$11.0</em> million was&nbsp;paid to current employees who held ACD unvested stock as of the acquisition date. In order to receive payment for unvested shares, the individuals had to remain employees of ACD over an <em data-td-fact-id="34100206" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">18</em>-month vesting period which extended from the acquisition date through <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> March 31, 2018. </em>Any amounts that would have been owed to individuals who left the company during the vesting period was pooled together and distributed amongst the other former ACD shareholders at the end of the vesting period. Management determined that <em data-td-fact-id="34100207" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$3.6</em> million of the <em data-td-fact-id="34100208" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$11.0</em> million represented purchase price consideration paid for pre-acquisition services. However, the remaining <em data-td-fact-id="34100209" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$7.4</em> million represented compensation expense as the amount the individual employees received was tied to future service. This liability recorded on the Consolidated Balance Sheets under the caption &ldquo;Salaries, wages and related accruals&rdquo; for the fiscal year ended <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2017.</em></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">During the <em data-td-fact-id="34100210" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">third</em> quarter of fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100211" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017,</em> management determined that the calendar year <em data-td-fact-id="34100212" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2016</em> revenue milestone was met. During the <em data-td-fact-id="34100213" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">third</em> quarter of fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100214" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018,</em> management determined that the calendar year <em data-td-fact-id="34100215" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> revenue milestone was met. Refer to Note <em data-td-fact-id="34100216" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">4</em> for discussion of this item as well as discussion of the changes to the fair value estimate for the calendar year revenue milestones as of <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2018 </em>and <em data-td-fact-id="34100217" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017.</em></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The goodwill recorded as a result of the ACD acquisition represents the strategic benefits of growing the Company&#39;s product portfolio and the expected revenue growth from increased market penetration from future products and customers. The goodwill is <em data-td-fact-id="34100218" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> deductible for income tax purposes. The business became part of the Company&rsquo;s Biotechnology reportable segment in the <em data-td-fact-id="34100219" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em> quarter of <em data-td-fact-id="34100220" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017.</em></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">As previously disclosed, ACD was acquired on <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> August 1, 2016. </em>The unaudited pro forma financial information below summarizes the combined results of operations for Bio-Techne and ACD as though the companies were combined as of the beginning fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100221" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2016.</em> The pro forma financial information for all periods presented includes the purchase accounting effects resulting from these acquisitions except for the increase in inventory to fair value and the fair value adjustments to contingent consideration as these are <em data-td-fact-id="34100222" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> expected to have a continuing impact on cost of goods sold or selling, general and administrative expense, respectively. The pro forma financial information as presented below is for informational purposes only and is <em data-td-fact-id="34100223" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> indicative of the results of operations that would have been achieved if the acquisitions had taken place at the beginning of fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100224" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2016.</em>&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<div data-td-parse-id="1" data-td-taggable-table="table" data-td-v2v-id="1533998698761" id="thunderdome-statement-982863">
<table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="finTable" style="width: 80%; text-indent: 0px; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-right: 20%;">

		<tr style="vertical-align: bottom;">
			<td style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</td>
			<td id=".lead.D3" style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</td>
			<td colspan="6" id=".amt.D3" style="text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0.05pt;">
			<p style="margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.05pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><i>Year Ended</i></i></p>
			</td>
			<td id=".trail.D3" style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</td>
		</tr>
		<tr style="vertical-align: bottom;">
			<td style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</td>

<div data-thunderdome-xbrl-exclude="1" id="PGBK" style="width: 100%; margin-right: 0pt; margin-left: 0pt;">
<div id="PGNUM" style="width: 100%; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">47</div>

<hr style="border: currentColor; border-image: none; width: 100%; height: 2px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); page-break-after: always; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">
<div id="PGHDR" style="width: 100%; text-align: left;"><a href="#toc">Table of Contents</a></div>
</div>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>Space Import-Export, Srl</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>&nbsp;</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">On <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> July 1, 2016, </em>the Company acquired Space Import-Export, Srl (Space) of Milan, Italy for approximately <em data-td-fact-id="34100225" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$9.0</em> million. <em data-td-fact-id="34100226" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$6.7</em> million was paid on the acquisition date and the remaining <em data-td-fact-id="34100227" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$2.3</em> million&nbsp;was paid during the <em data-td-fact-id="34100228" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em> quarter of fiscal year <em data-td-fact-id="34100229" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018.</em> Space was a long-time distribution partner of the Company in the Italian market. The acquisition resulted in goodwill as we expect strategic benefits of revenue growth from increased market penetration. The goodwill is <em data-td-fact-id="34100230" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> deductible for income tax purposes. The business became part of the Company&rsquo;s Biotechnology reportable segment in the <em data-td-fact-id="34100231" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em> quarter of <em data-td-fact-id="34100232" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017.</em></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><em data-td-fact-id="34100233" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2016</em> Acquisitions</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>&nbsp;</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>Zephyrus Biosciences, Inc.</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>&nbsp;</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">On <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> March 14, 2016, </em>the Company acquired Zephyrus Biosciences, Inc. (Zephyrus) for <em data-td-fact-id="34100234" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$8.0</em> million in cash and up to <em data-td-fact-id="34100235" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$7.0</em> million in contingent consideration. Zephyrus provides research tools to enable protein analysis at the single cell level. Addressing the burgeoning single cell analysis market, Zephyrus&#39;s <em data-td-fact-id="34100236" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em> product, Milo&trade;, enables western blotting on individual cells for the <em data-td-fact-id="34100237" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em> time. The acquisition was funded with cash on hand. The purchase price of Zephyrus exceeded the preliminary estimated fair value of the identifiable net assets and, accordingly, the difference was allocated to goodwill, substantially all of which is <em data-td-fact-id="34100238" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> tax deductible. Zephryus is included in the Company&#39;s Protein Platforms segment.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">In connection with the Zephyrus acquisition, the Company recorded <em data-td-fact-id="34100239" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$7.4</em> million of in process research and development which is <em data-td-fact-id="34100240" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> amortized until it is converted to developed technology which occurs once a sale of its product is completed. In the <em data-td-fact-id="34100241" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em> quarter of fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100242" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017,</em> the Company transferred the balance of in process research and development to developed technology and began amortizing the intangible asset after Zephyrus made its <em data-td-fact-id="34100243" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em> sale. The intangible asset amortization for the developed technology is <em data-td-fact-id="34100244" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> deductible for income tax purposes.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The acquisition included contingent payments up to <em data-td-fact-id="34100245" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$7.0</em> million.&nbsp; <em data-td-fact-id="34100246" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$3.5</em> million paid if and when <em data-td-fact-id="34100247" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">10</em> instruments are sold prior to the <em data-td-fact-id="34100248" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">3</em>-year anniversary of the closing date (<em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> March 14, 2019) </em>and an&nbsp;additional <em data-td-fact-id="34100249" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$3.5</em> million if and when <em data-td-fact-id="34100250" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$3.0</em> million in cumulative sales are generated within <em data-td-fact-id="34100251" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">4.5</em> years of the closing date (<em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> September 14, 2020). </em>The Company made a <em data-td-fact-id="34100252" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$3.5</em> million payment in the <em data-td-fact-id="34100253" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">third</em> quarter of fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100254" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> after Zephyrus sold its <em data-td-fact-id="34100255" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">tenth</em> instrument and a <em data-td-fact-id="34100256" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$3.5</em> million payment in the <em data-td-fact-id="34100257" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">fourth</em> quarter of fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100258" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> after Zephyrus met the <em data-td-fact-id="34100259" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$3.0</em> million revenue milestone. Refer to Note <em data-td-fact-id="34100260" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">4</em> for discussion&nbsp;of these payments&nbsp;as well as discussion of the changes to the fair value estimate for these milestones as of <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2018 </em>and <em data-td-fact-id="34100261" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017.</em></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The goodwill recorded as a result of the Zephyrus acquisition represents the strategic benefits of growing the Company&#39;s product portfolio and the expected revenue growth from increased market penetration from future products and customers. The goodwill is <em data-td-fact-id="34100262" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> deductible for income tax purposes.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>Cliniqa Corporation</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">On <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> July 8, 2015, </em>the Company acquired Cliniqa Corporation (Cliniqa) for approximately <em data-td-fact-id="34100263" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$82.9</em> million. Cliniqa specializes in the manufacturing and commercialization of blood chemistry quality controls and calibrators as well as bulk reagents used for the clinical diagnostic market to further expand and complement our Diagnostics solutions. The acquisition was funded with cash on hand and funds obtained from our revolving credit facility. The purchase price of Cliniqa exceeded the fair value of the identifiable net assets and, accordingly, the difference was allocated to goodwill. Cliniqa is included in the Company&#39;s Diagnostics segment.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The goodwill recorded as a result of the Cliniqa acquisition represents the strategic benefits of growing the Company&#39;s product portfolio and the expected revenue growth from increased market penetration from future products and customers. The goodwill is <em data-td-fact-id="34100264" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> deductible for income tax purposes.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<div data-thunderdome-xbrl-exclude="1" id="PGBK" style="width: 100%; margin-right: 0pt; margin-left: 0pt;">
<div id="PGNUM" style="width: 100%; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">48</div>

<hr style="border: currentColor; border-image: none; width: 100%; height: 2px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); page-break-after: always; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">
<div id="PGHDR" style="width: 100%; text-align: left;"><a href="#toc">Table of Contents</a></div>
</div>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The aggregate purchase price of the acquisitions was allocated to the assets acquired and liabilities assumed based on their estimated fair values as of the acquisition date. The following table summarizes the estimated fair values of the assets acquired and liabilities assumed as a result of the fiscal year <em data-td-fact-id="34100265" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> and <em data-td-fact-id="34100266" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2016</em> acquisitions (in thousands):</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

			<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><i>ACD</i></i></p>

</div>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Tangible assets acquired, net of liabilities assumed, were stated at fair value at the date of acquisition based on management&#39;s assessment. The purchase price allocated to developed technology, trade names, non-compete agreements and customer relationships was based on management&#39;s forecasted cash inflows and outflows and using a relief-from-royalty and a multi-period excess earnings method to calculate the fair value of assets purchased. The developed technology is being amortized with the expense reflected in cost of goods sold in the Consolidated Statements of Earnings and Comprehensive Income. Amortization expense related to trade names, the non-compete agreement and customer relationships is reflected in selling, general and administrative expenses in the Consolidated Statements of Earnings and Comprehensive Income. The deferred income tax liability represents the estimated future impact of adjustments for the cost to be recognized upon the sale of acquired inventory that was written up to fair value and intangible asset amortization, both of which are <em data-td-fact-id="34100267" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> deductible for income tax purposes, and the future tax benefit of net operating loss and tax credit carryforwards which will be deductible by the Company in future periods.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>
</div>

<div contenteditable="false" docsect="9" id="29161" sectdesc="Note to Financial Statements">&nbsp;</div>

<div data-td-parse-id="1" data-td-statement-type="note" data-td-v2v-id="1533998708841" id="thunderdome-statement-982865">
<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Note <em data-td-fact-id="34100268" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">3.</em> Supplemental Balance Sheet and Cash Flow Information:</b></i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&nbsp;</b></i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>Available-For-Sale Investments:</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The fair value of the Company&#39;s available-for-sale investments as of <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2018 </em>and <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2017 </em>were <em data-td-fact-id="34100269" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$59.8</em> million and <em data-td-fact-id="34100270" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$66.1</em> million, respectively. The decrease was caused by the sale of <em data-td-fact-id="34100271" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$26.9</em> million of the Company&rsquo;s investment in ChemoCentryx, Inc. (CCXI) in the <em data-td-fact-id="34100272" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">fourth</em> quarter of fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100273" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> and the maturity of <em data-td-fact-id="34100274" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$2.1</em> million in corporate bond securities held by Advanced Cell Diagnostics (ACD). This decrease was&nbsp;partially offset by year-over-year increases in the stock price of CCXI, from <em data-td-fact-id="34100275" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$9.36</em> per share at <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2017&nbsp;</em>to <em data-td-fact-id="34100276" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$13.17</em> per share at <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2018 </em>resulting in a <em data-td-fact-id="34100277" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$15.7</em> million increase in the fair value of the Company&#39;s investment in CCXI. The amortized cost basis of the Company&#39;s investment in CCXI as of <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2018 </em>and <em data-td-fact-id="34100278" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> was <em data-td-fact-id="34100279" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$18.8</em> million and <em data-td-fact-id="34100280" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$29.5</em> million, respectively.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The unrealized gain (loss) on available-for-sale investments for fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100281" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> includes a <em data-td-fact-id="34100282" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$35.4</em> million unrealized gain related to our investment in CCXI. As of <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2018, </em>the stock price of CCXI was <em data-td-fact-id="34100283" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$13.17</em> per share compared to our cost basis of <em data-td-fact-id="34100284" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$4.73</em> per share.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<div data-thunderdome-xbrl-exclude="1" id="PGBK" style="width: 100%; margin-right: 0pt; margin-left: 0pt;">

<div data-td-parse-id="1" data-td-taggable-table="table" data-td-v2v-id="1533998708835" id="thunderdome-statement-982868">
<table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="finTable" style="width: 90%; text-indent: 0px; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-right: 10%;">

		<tr style="vertical-align: bottom;">

<hr style="border: currentColor; border-image: none; width: 100%; height: 2px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); page-break-after: always; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">

</div>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Amortization expense related to technologies included in cost of sales was <em data-td-fact-id="34100285" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$25.3</em> million <em data-td-fact-id="34100286" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$23.1</em> million, and <em data-td-fact-id="34100287" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$11.1</em> million in fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100288" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018,</em> <em data-td-fact-id="34100289" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017,</em> and <em data-td-fact-id="34100290" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2016,</em> respectively. Amortization expense related to trade names, customer relationships, non-compete agreements, and patents included in selling, general and administrative expense was <em data-td-fact-id="34100291" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$21.6</em> million, <em data-td-fact-id="34100292" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$21.3</em> million, and <em data-td-fact-id="34100293" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$18.3</em> million, in fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100294" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018,</em> <em data-td-fact-id="34100295" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017,</em> and <em data-td-fact-id="34100296" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2016</em> respectively.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>&nbsp;</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">As of <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2018, </em>the Company had <em data-td-fact-id="34100297" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$5.3</em> million of other assets compared to <em data-td-fact-id="34100298" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$44.0</em> million as of <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2017. </em>The decrease was due to&nbsp;the impairment and sale of its investment in Astute Medical, Inc. (Astute) during fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100299" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018.</em>&nbsp; The Company held a <em data-td-fact-id="34100300" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">16.4%</em> ownership interest in Astute and accounted for the investment under the cost method. During the <em data-td-fact-id="34100301" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">third</em> quarter of fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100302" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018,</em> the Company learned that Astute intended to accept an offer to sell the company to a <em data-td-fact-id="34100303" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">third</em> party. As a result of this triggering event, the Company completed an impairment assessment and determined that a portion of its investment in Astute was other-than-temporarily impaired and adjusted the carrying value of its investment by <em data-td-fact-id="34100304" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$16.2</em> million to other income (expense) in the accompanying Consolidated Statements of Earnings and Comprehensive Income. During the <em data-td-fact-id="34100305" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">fourth</em> quarter of fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100306" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018,</em> the Company decreased its investment in Astute by another <em data-td-fact-id="34100307" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$22.5</em> million after receiving cash payment upon the closing of the acquisition. As of <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2018, </em>the Company has a <em data-td-fact-id="34100308" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$1.3</em> million remaining investment in Astute for the additional cash payment it expects to receive upon liquidation of the escrow account.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<div id="PGNUM" style="width: 100%; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">51</div>

<p style="margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 18pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><sup>(<em data-td-fact-id="34100309" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">1</em>)</sup> Consists of holdback payments due at future dates and liabilities for contingent consideration. Further information regarding liabilities for contingent consideration can be found in Note <em data-td-fact-id="34100310" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">4.</em></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>
</div>

<div contenteditable="false" docsect="9" id="29162" sectdesc="Note to Financial Statements">&nbsp;</div>

<div data-td-parse-id="1" data-td-statement-type="note" data-td-v2v-id="1533998717545" id="thunderdome-statement-982874">
<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Note <em data-td-fact-id="34100311" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">4.</em> Fair Value Measurements:</b></i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&nbsp;</b></i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company&rsquo;s financial instruments include cash and cash equivalents, available-for-sale investments, accounts receivable, accounts payable, contingent consideration obligations, and long-term debt.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Fair value is defined as the amount that would be received to sell an asset or paid to transfer a liability in an orderly transaction between market participants as of the measurement date. This standard also establishes a hierarchy for inputs used in measuring fair value. This standard maximizes the use of observable inputs and minimizes the use of unobservable inputs by requiring that the most observable inputs be used when available. Observable inputs are inputs market participants would use in valuing the asset or liability based on market data obtained from independent sources. Unobservable inputs are inputs that reflect our assumptions about the factors market participants would use in valuing the asset or liability based upon the best information available in the circumstances.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The categorization of financial assets and liabilities within the valuation hierarchy is based upon the lowest level of input that is significant to the fair value measurement. The hierarchy is broken down into <em data-td-fact-id="34100312" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">three</em> levels. Level <em data-td-fact-id="34100313" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">1</em> inputs are quoted prices in active markets for identical assets or liabilities. Level <em data-td-fact-id="34100314" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2</em> inputs include quoted prices for similar assets or liabilities in active markets, quoted prices for identical or similar assets or liabilities in markets that are <em data-td-fact-id="34100315" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> active, and inputs (other than quoted prices) that are observable for the asset or liability, either directly or indirectly. Level <em data-td-fact-id="34100316" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">3</em> inputs are unobservable for the asset or liability and their fair values are determined using pricing models, discounted cash flow methodologies or similar techniques and at least <em data-td-fact-id="34100317" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">one</em> significant model assumption or input is unobservable. Level <em data-td-fact-id="34100318" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">3</em> <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> may </em>also include certain investment securities for which there is limited market activity or a decrease in the observability of market pricing for the investments, such that the determination of fair value requires significant judgment or estimation.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The following tables provide information by level for financial assets and liabilities that are measured at fair value on a recurring basis (in thousands):</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<div data-td-parse-id="1" data-td-taggable-table="table" data-td-v2v-id="1533998717540" id="thunderdome-statement-982875">

			<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><i>Total carrying</i></i></p>

			<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><i>value a</i><i>s of</i></i></p>

			<td style="width: 9pt;">&nbsp;</td>
			<td style="width: 18pt;">
			<p style="text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-right: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><sup>(<em data-td-fact-id="34100319" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">1</em>)</sup>&nbsp;</p>
			</td>
			<td>
			<p style="text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-right: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;">Included in available-for-sale investments on the balance sheet</p>
			</td>
		</tr>

</table>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Our available for sale securities are measured at fair value using quoted market prices in active markets for identical assets and are therefore classified as Level <em data-td-fact-id="34100320" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">1</em> assets. We value our Level <em data-td-fact-id="34100321" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2</em> assets using inputs that are based on market indices of similar assets within an active market. All of our Level <em data-td-fact-id="34100322" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2</em> assets outstanding as of <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2017 </em>had maturity dates of less than <em data-td-fact-id="34100323" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">one</em> year and were sold during fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100324" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018.</em></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The use of different assumptions, applying different judgment to matters that inherently are subjective and changes in future market conditions could result in different estimates of fair value of our securities or contingent consideration, currently and in the future. If market conditions deteriorate, we <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> may </em>incur impairment charges for securities in our investment portfolio. We <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> may </em>also incur changes to our contingent consideration liability as discussed below.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">In connection with the Advanced Cell Diagnostics (ACD) acquisition discussed in Note <em data-td-fact-id="34100325" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2,</em> as well as with the Zephyrus and CyVek acquisitions which occurred in prior years, we were required to make contingent payments, subject to the entities achieving certain sales and revenue thresholds. The contingent consideration payments were up to <em data-td-fact-id="34100326" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$35.0</em> million, <em data-td-fact-id="34100327" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$7.0</em> million and <em data-td-fact-id="34100328" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$75.0</em> million related to the CyVek, Zephyrus, and ACD acquisitions, respectively. The fair value of the liabilities for the contingent payments recognized upon each acquisition as part of the purchase accounting opening balance sheet totaled <em data-td-fact-id="34100329" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$78.5</em> million (<em data-td-fact-id="34100330" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$35.0</em> million for CyVek, <em data-td-fact-id="34100331" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$6.5</em> million for Zephyrus, and <em data-td-fact-id="34100332" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$37.0</em> million for ACD) and was estimated by discounting to present value the probability-weighted contingent payments expected to be made. Assumptions used in these calculations include units sold, expected revenue, discount rate and various probability factors. The ultimate settlement of contingent consideration could deviate from current estimates based on the actual results of these financial measures. This liability is considered to be a Level <em data-td-fact-id="34100333" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">3</em> financial liability that is re-measured each reporting period. The change in fair value of contingent consideration for these acquisitions is included in general and administrative expense.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">In fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100334" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018,</em> the Company made <em data-td-fact-id="34100335" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$88.5</em> million in cash payments towards the ACD, CyVek and Zephyrus contingent consideration liabilities after it determined certain sales and revenue thresholds were met. Of the <em data-td-fact-id="34100336" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$88.5</em> million in total payments, <em data-td-fact-id="34100337" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$61.9</em> million is classified as financing on the statement of cash flows. The remaining <em data-td-fact-id="34100338" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$26.6</em> million is recorded as operating on the statement of cash flows as it represents the consideration liability that exceeds the amount of the contingent consideration liability recognized at the acquisition date. The Company has <em data-td-fact-id="34100339" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">no</em> remaining contingent consideration liabilities as of <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2018.</em></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">In fiscal <em data-td-fact-id="34100340" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017,</em> the Company made <em data-td-fact-id="34100341" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$28.5</em> million (<em data-td-fact-id="34100342" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$3.5</em> million for Zephyrus and <em data-td-fact-id="34100343" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$25.0</em> million for ACD) in cash payments towards the ACD and Zephyrus contingent consideration liabilities after it determined that certain sales and revenue thresholds were met. Of the <em data-td-fact-id="34100344" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$28.5</em> million in total payments, <em data-td-fact-id="34100345" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$16.7</em> million is classified as financing on the statement of cash flows. The financing component represents the portion of the total liability that was recognized at the acquisition date. The remaining <em data-td-fact-id="34100346" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$11.8</em> million is recorded within operating cash flows as it represents the consideration liability that exceed the amount of the contingent consideration liability recognized at the acquisition date.&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<div data-thunderdome-xbrl-exclude="1" id="PGBK" style="width: 100%; margin-right: 0pt; margin-left: 0pt;">
<div id="PGNUM" style="width: 100%; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">53</div>

</table>
</div>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>Fair value measurements of other financial instruments </i>&ndash; The following methods and assumptions were used to estimate the fair value of each class of financial instrument for which it is practicable to estimate fair value.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Cash and cash equivalents, certificates of deposit, accounts receivable, and accounts payable &ndash; The carrying amounts reported in the consolidated balance sheets approximate fair value because of the short-term nature of these items.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Long-term debt &ndash; The carrying amounts reported in the consolidated balance sheets for the amount drawn on our line-of-credit facility approximates fair value because our interest rate is variable and reflects current market rates.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&nbsp;</b></i></p>
</div>

<div contenteditable="false" docsect="9" id="29163" sectdesc="Note to Financial Statements">&nbsp;</div>

<div data-td-parse-id="1" data-td-statement-type="note" data-td-v2v-id="1533998723630" id="thunderdome-statement-982878">
<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Note <em data-td-fact-id="34100348" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">5</em></b></i><i><b>. Debt and Other Financing Arrangements:</b></i><i><b>&nbsp;</b></i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&nbsp;</b></i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company entered into revolving line-of-credit facility governed by a Credit Agreement (the Credit Agreement) on <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> July 28, 2016. </em>The Credit Agreement provides for a revolving credit facility of <em data-td-fact-id="34100349" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$400</em> million, which can be increased by an additional <em data-td-fact-id="34100350" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$200</em> million subject to certain conditions. Borrowings under the Credit Agreement <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> may </em>be used for working capital and expenditures of the Company and its subsidiaries, including financing permitted acquisitions. Borrowings under the Credit Agreement for base rate loans bear interest at a variable rate equal to the greater of (i)&nbsp;the prime commercial rate, (ii)&nbsp;the per annum federal funds rate plus <em data-td-fact-id="34100351" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">0.5%,</em> or (iii)&nbsp;LIBOR + <em data-td-fact-id="34100352" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">1.00%</em> - <em data-td-fact-id="34100353" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">1.75%</em> depending on the existing total leverage ratio of Debt to Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation and Amortization (as defined in the Credit Agreement). The annualized fee for any unused portion of the credit facility is currently <em data-td-fact-id="34100354" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">25</em> basis points.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Credit Agreement would have matured&nbsp;on <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> July&nbsp;</em><em data-td-fact-id="34100355" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">28,</em> <em data-td-fact-id="34100356" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2021</em> and contains customary restrictive and financial covenants and customary events of default. As of <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June&nbsp;</em><em data-td-fact-id="34100357" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">30,</em> <em data-td-fact-id="34100358" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018,</em> the outstanding balance under the Credit Agreement was <em data-td-fact-id="34100359" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$339.0</em> million.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">In connection with the acquisition of Exosome Diagnostics, Inc. on <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> August 1, 2018, </em>the Company entered into a new credit facility that provides for a revolving credit facility of <em data-td-fact-id="34100360" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$600</em> million, which can be increased by an additional <em data-td-fact-id="34100361" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$200</em> million subject to certain conditions,&nbsp;and a term loan of <em data-td-fact-id="34100362" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$250</em> million.&nbsp; The credit facility is governed by a Credit Agreement dated <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> August 1, 2018 and matures on August 1, 2023. </em>This facility replaced the revolving line-of-credit facility mentioned above and bears interest at a variable rate.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>
</div>

<div contenteditable="false" docsect="9" id="29164" sectdesc="Note to Financial Statements">&nbsp;</div>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&nbsp;</b></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Total rent expense was approximately <em data-td-fact-id="34100365" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$10.8</em> million, <em data-td-fact-id="34100366" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$9.8</em> million, and <em data-td-fact-id="34100367" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$8.1</em> million for the years ended <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2018, </em><em data-td-fact-id="34100368" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017,</em> and <em data-td-fact-id="34100369" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2016,</em> respectively.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 12.25pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company is routinely subject to claims and involved in legal actions which are incidental to the business of the Company. Although it is difficult to predict the ultimate outcome of these matters, management believes that any ultimate liability will <em data-td-fact-id="34100370" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> materially affect the consolidated financial position or results of operations of the Company.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&nbsp;</b></p>
</div>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<div data-thunderdome-xbrl-exclude="1" id="PGBK" style="width: 100%; margin-right: 0pt; margin-left: 0pt;">
<div id="PGNUM" style="width: 100%; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">55</div>

<hr style="border: currentColor; border-image: none; width: 100%; height: 2px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); page-break-after: always; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">
<div id="PGHDR" style="width: 100%; text-align: left;"><a href="#toc">Table of Contents</a></div>
</div>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Basic net income per common share is calculated based on the weighted average number of common shares outstanding during the period. Diluted net income per common share is computed by dividing net income by the weighted average number of common and potentially dilutive common shares outstanding during the period. Potentially dilutive common shares of our stock result from dilutive common stock options and restricted stock units. We use the treasury stock method to calculate the weighted-average shares used in the diluted earnings per share computation. Under the treasury stock method, the proceeds from exercise of an option, the amount of compensation cost, if any, for future service that we have <em data-td-fact-id="34100373" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> yet recognized, and the amount of estimated tax benefits that would be recorded in paid-in capital, if any, when the option is exercised are assumed to be used to repurchase shares in the current period.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The dilutive effect of stock options in the above table excludes all options for which the aggregate exercise proceeds exceeded the average market price for the period. The number of potentially dilutive option shares excluded from the calculation was <em data-td-fact-id="34100374" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">0.9</em> million, <em data-td-fact-id="34100375" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2.0</em> million, and <em data-td-fact-id="34100376" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">1.2</em> million for the fiscal years ended <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2018, </em><em data-td-fact-id="34100377" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> and <em data-td-fact-id="34100378" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2016,</em> respectively.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&nbsp;</b></p>
</div>

<div contenteditable="false" docsect="9" id="29167" sectdesc="Note to Financial Statements">&nbsp;</div>

<div data-td-parse-id="1" data-td-statement-type="note" data-td-v2v-id="1533998759279" id="thunderdome-statement-982885">
<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Note <em data-td-fact-id="34100379" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">9.</em>&nbsp;Share-based Compensation and Other Benefit Plans:</b></i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>&nbsp;</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The cost of employee services received in exchange for the award of equity instruments is based on the fair value of the award at the date of grant. Compensation cost is recognized using a straight-line method over the vesting period and is net of estimated forfeitures. Stock option exercises and stock awards are satisfied through the issuance of new shares.&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>&nbsp;</i></p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>Equity incentive plan:</i> The Company&#39;s Second Amended and Restated <em data-td-fact-id="34100380" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2010</em> Equity Incentive Plan (the Second A&amp;R <em data-td-fact-id="34100381" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2010</em> Plan) provides for the granting of incentive and nonqualified stock options, restricted stock, restricted stock units, performance shares, performance units and stock appreciation rights. There are <em data-td-fact-id="34100382" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">6.6</em> million shares of common stock authorized for grant under the Second A&amp;R <em data-td-fact-id="34100383" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2010</em> Plan. At <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2018, </em>there were <em data-td-fact-id="34100384" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2.4</em> million shares of common stock available for grant under the&nbsp;Second A&amp;R <em data-td-fact-id="34100385" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2010</em> Plan. The maximum term of incentive options granted under the Second A&amp;R <em data-td-fact-id="34100386" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2010</em> Plan is <em data-td-fact-id="34100387" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">ten</em> years. The Second A&amp;R <em data-td-fact-id="34100388" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2010</em> Plan amended and restated the Company&#39;s Amended and Restate <em data-td-fact-id="34100389" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2010</em> Equity Incentive Plan (the A&amp;R <em data-td-fact-id="34100390" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2010</em> Plan). The A&amp;R <em data-td-fact-id="34100391" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2010</em> Plan&nbsp;replaced the Company&#39;s <em data-td-fact-id="34100392" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">1998</em> Nonqualified Stock Option Plan (the <em data-td-fact-id="34100393" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">1998</em> Plan). The Second A&amp;R <em data-td-fact-id="34100394" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2010</em> Plan and the <em data-td-fact-id="34100395" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">1998</em> Plan (collectively, the Plans) are administered by the Board of Directors and its Executive Compensation Committee, which determine the persons who are to receive awards under the Plans, the number of shares subject to each award and the term and exercise price of each award. The number of shares of common stock subject to outstanding awards as of <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> June 30, 2018 </em>under the Second A&amp;R <em data-td-fact-id="34100396" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2010</em> Plan and the <em data-td-fact-id="34100397" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">1998</em> Plan were <em data-td-fact-id="34100398" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">3.4</em> million and <em data-td-fact-id="34100399" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">35,000,</em> respectively.&nbsp; On <em data-td-invalid-detail="1" style="font-style: normal; font-weight: inherit;"> April 26, 2018 </em>the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors approved a modification to the Equity Incentive Plan.&nbsp;&nbsp; The modification implements a new retirement policy that permits retirees to continue vesting in certain time-based stock options granted during employment, resulting in accelerated stock compensation expense for those employees meeting the definition of retirement eligible.&nbsp; This modification resulted in an additional <em data-td-fact-id="34100400" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">$8.3</em> million of expense during fiscal year <em data-td-fact-id="34100401" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> and affected&nbsp;all employees who participate in the plan.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The fair values of options granted under the Plans were estimated on the date of grant using the Black-Scholes option-pricing model with the following assumptions used:</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

			<td style="width: 4%; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt;"><em data-td-fact-id="34099567" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">4.7</em></td>
			<td id=".amt.3" style="width: 4%; text-align: right; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt;"><em data-td-fact-id="34099568" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">&nbsp;</em></td>
			<td id=".trail.3" nowrap="true" style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt;">&nbsp;</td>
			<td id=".lead.4" style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</td>
			<td id=".symb.4" style="width: 4%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><em data-td-fact-id="34099569" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">&nbsp;</em></td>
			<td style="width: 4%; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt;"><em data-td-fact-id="34099570" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">4.8</em></td>
			<td id=".amt.4" style="width: 4%; text-align: right; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt;"><em data-td-fact-id="34099571" style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">&nbsp;</em></td>
			<td id=".trail.4" nowrap="true" style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt;">&nbsp;</td>
		</tr>

</table>
</div>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The dividend yield is based on the Company&#39;s historical annual cash dividend divided by the market value of the Company&#39;s common stock. The expected annualized volatility is based on the Company&#39;s historical stock price over a period equivalent to the expected life of the option granted. The risk-free interest rate is based on U.S. Treasury constant maturity interest rates with a term consistent with the expected life of the options granted.</p>

<p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&nbsp;</p>

<div data-thunderdome-xbrl-exclude="1" id="PGBK" style="width: 100%; margin-right: 0pt; margin-left: 0pt;">
<div id="PGNUM" style="width: 100%; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">56</div>

<div id="PGHDR" style="width: 100%; text-align: left;"><a href="#toc">Table of Contents</a></div>
